## Existing Policy

**Policy ID:**

**Policy Owner:**  

## Revision Type

- [ ] Administrative update
- [ ] Content revision
- [ ] Annual review
- [ ] Legal or regulatory update
- [ ] Governance update
- [ ] Formatting correction
- [ ] Other

## Requested Change

Describe the requested revision.

## Reason for Change

Explain why the revision is needed.

## Classification Review

- [ ] Policy remains public-facing
- [ ] Policy should be moved to internal-only environment
- [ ] Unsure / needs classification review

## Review Requirements

- [ ] Governance review
- [ ] Compliance review
- [ ] Legal review
- [ ] Privacy/Security review
- [ ] Board approval or board record
- [ ] No additional review beyond policy owner approval
- [ ] Other

## Supporting Materials

Attach or link any supporting documents, source records, or approval materials.
